title: Opolis Miners
description: Create large multiblock structures to mine ores
body:
This mod creates big multiblock structures to mine ores for you

Adds 10 tiers of miners and support strucutres to mine ores for you.

Higher tier of frames allow for the mining of better ores and blocks, higher tier frames can also be used on lower tier ores. 

Frames are tag based meaning if you add a blocks to the tags you can create your own frames, Resources mined are also tagged based.

Has a in-game guide book using patchouli which shows the strucutres needed as well as information of various other features of the mod

Tree absorbers are big sturcutres that can be used to create tree drops


Fluid absorber are big strucutres that can be used to create fluids


All the different machines have full JEI support and recipes can be created in json inside datapacks


Used in the techopolis 2 modpack

Join the discord for help and suggestions

https://discord.gg/f92STFGN32
